Note: 1200: Off Quantico. Noon: On way to Hampton roads
1250: Got Underway. Steamed up Elizabeth River
1630: Got Underway. Moored at Norfolk Navy Yard

Ships: 1130: Ships anchored in the roads. Tennessee, Minnesote, Constitution, Vandalia, Galena, KEARSARGE, Alliance, Saratoga and Portsmouth.

People: 1605: The Hon Secretary of the Navy, Rear Admirols Scott and Nyman and Chief Const Easby visited the ship.

Note: 1005: Got Underway. Starting Speed trial. Trial ended at 1755 off Ft Monroe.
0845: Got Underway. For Norfolk Anchored Norfolk Navy Yard 1040

People: 0800: General order of Nov 19 announcing death of Brig Gen Zeiliu USMC

Note: 1400: Got Underway. 1545 came to in Hampton Roads.
1545: Anchored. Brgs Old Pt Comfort Lt NExE; Centre of Rip-Raps SE1/2S.
0640: Got Underway. Speed trials standing up Chesapeake Bay
1645: Moored. To buoy off !Cananaiqua!  (Norfolk Navy Yards)
